Bestseller Campaigns
Bonus
If you want a bestseller
• Hitting the bestseller list comes down to focusing
all your book sales into a specific period of time
• The rules are murky, and they change constantly
• For Amazon… it’s about focusing within a single
day (or less) - be sure to get a screen shot!
• For NY Times, it’s about sales within one week
